entries.title: Lead Management — Business Contract
verified_against: spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-13): distilled from lead-lifecycle PR-1..PR-5 shipped evidence + multi-actor-coverage contracts; no invented behavior
entries.notes: Business layer of the lead-management experience: shared-lead/owned-execution policy, no-spam channel discipline, typed archiving. Sources verified shipped behavior; engagement remains governed by engagement-approval.

entries.title: Lead Management — Operator Experience
verified_against: spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-13): lifecycle tabs (LifecycleTabs.tsx), queue ordering, archive/unarchive endpoints, copilot_wording.go all verified shipped; compaction flagged planned
entries.notes: Experience layer of lead-management: shipped lifecycle states/tabs, queue ordering, coverage skip reasons, archive/restore, copilot wording. Planned items (retention compaction) explicitly flagged.
